query: Brownfield active intent ranking and scoped find packs
slice_title: Boost owner decision records active phase docs and Status next plans above blocked or superseded epics
goal: Record progress for `Brownfield active intent ranking and scoped find packs`.
description: Added active intent authority signals so owner decision records, north-star active phase docs, and Status: next plans outrank blocked or superseded historical intent; scout demotion now moves blocked historical intent out of the working set when current intent is present.

learnings.summary: Current owner decision records, north-star active phase docs, and forward statuses such as Status: next need explicit authority signals before stale or blocked epics can be safely treated as historical context.
